repo.description: Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation via Adaptive Equalization Learning, NeurIPS 2021 (Spotlight)

terms.context_snippet: Due to the limited and even imbalanced data, semi-supervised semantic segmentation tends to have poor performance on some certain categories, e.g., tailed categories in Cityscapes dataset which exhibits a long-tailed label distribution.
